title: Crumble and Onion Indian Omelette
description: A flavorful and healthy omelette made with fragrant spices, crumbled paneer, and sautéed onions. Perfect for a quick breakfast or snack.
instructions: Crack 2 eggs into a bowl and whisk them together.
Heat the oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until it's translucent.
Add the crumbled paneer and stir to combine.
Add the curry powder and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Pour in the whisked eggs and let them set.
Use a spatula to gently lift and fold the edges of the omelette.
Once the eggs are almost set, use the spatula to fold the omelette in half.
Cook for another minute and serve hot.
